message:
test(integration): expand resize state machine, invariant contract, and watchdog tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 20 transaction state machine tests (phase transitions, supersession,
monotonicity), 18 invariant contract tests (screen bounds, presentation
dimension consistency), and 6 watchdog integration tests (severity levels,
assessment fields, emergency disable).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
